name: Chunky Tomato-Citrus Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Chopped fresh pineapple (or 8 oz. can crushed pineapple, drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Mix well until everything is incorporated.
3. Cover with plastic wrap.
4. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes.
5. Serve as a relish for grilled fish or meat.
6. Makes 1 1/4 Cups
